title: Zesty Slovakian Hash
description: A hearty hash dish with zesty flavors inspired by Slovakian cuisine. Serve as a side or light meal.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat 2 tbsp of oil over medium heat.
Add the diced hash and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the grated carrots and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes.
Sprinkle the zesty seasoning blend, Slovakian paprika, salt, and black pepper over the hash and carrots.
Toss everything together and continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes.
